paperInkWoodInteractions.locationSeed: Mallory Vale case desk or Black Ribbon Press intake counter
paperInkWoodInteractions.result: A damp receipt or ledger slip exposes a watermark naming a second signer.
paperInkWoodInteractions.statusText: The paper drinks the word. A watermark lifts from the fibers.
paperInkWoodInteractions.authoringNote: Use as a deterministic clue reveal, not as inventory crafting.

paperInkWoodInteractions.locationSeed: stained confession page near Eddie Pike or a later witness desk
paperInkWoodInteractions.result: A dried ink blot crawls into a legible contradiction and adds one journal hint.
paperInkWoodInteractions.statusText: The ink remembers the lie before the witness does.
paperInkWoodInteractions.authoringNote: Keep the effect text-only and deterministic; do not change witness state unless explicitly scoped.

paperInkWoodInteractions.locationSeed: locked alley doorframe or Black Ribbon Press office threshold
paperInkWoodInteractions.result: A hairline crack opens in the wood and exposes tally marks matching a True Name clue pattern.
paperInkWoodInteractions.statusText: The old wood parts just enough to show what it swallowed.
paperInkWoodInteractions.authoringNote: Reveal clue structure only; do not auto-solve name input or bypass the door gate.

paperInkWoodInteractions.result: A false lead fades, leaving the original pressure mark from the real typed name.
paperInkWoodInteractions.statusText: The carbon copy loses its lie. The pressure mark remains.
paperInkWoodInteractions.authoringNote: Use to prune confusion after the player has enough evidence; avoid making it required before the player understands the clue.

paperInkWoodInteractions.result: A blank form receives a Black Ribbon Press mark that points toward the next scene or witness.
paperInkWoodInteractions.statusText: The stamp drops like a judge's gavel. Black Ribbon Press answers in ink.
paperInkWoodInteractions.authoringNote: Good bridge interaction for scene-to-scene progression without introducing inventory.

ghostEncounterSeeds.statusText: The hum in the walls grows teeth.
ghostEncounterSeeds.intent: Warn player that repeated misuse increases pressure.

ghostEncounterSeeds.statusText: Frost climbs the typebars; the ghost noticed.
ghostEncounterSeeds.intent: Signal near-correct naming without confirming the answer.

witnessCommandSeeds.result: Witness reveals one constrained follow-up hint.
witnessCommandSeeds.authoringNote: Keep compatible with current witness command grammar.

witnessCommandSeeds.result: Witness trust partially recovers; pressure cost remains.
witnessCommandSeeds.authoringNote: Useful for reversible narrative beats without new systems.

noirCopyGuidelines: Lead with actionable meaning before mood.
Prefer one vivid image per line.
Keep critical status text under roughly 90 characters.
Do not present speculative mechanics as already playable.
